releases.author: ohm-en
releases.description: This is a pre-release to resolve the issue described in https://github.com/ohm-en/obsidian-plugin-manager/issues/5 to be installed via BRAT until the settings menu rework is complete.
releases.name: v0.1.6-alpha

releases.author: ohm-en
releases.description: This should fix the id mismatching issue referenced [here](https://github.com/ohm-en/obsidian-plugin-manager/issues/3).
releases.name: v0.1.5 | Fixed ID Mismatch

releases.author: ohm-en
releases.description: The previous bug fixing release created its own bug. This release should fix that.
releases.name: v0.1.4 | Bug Fix The Bug Fix

releases.author: ohm-en
releases.description:
Intends to resolve a bug where newly installed plugins were not being registered. If you're having an issue setting a lazy load delay value on certain plugins, I suggest updating.

More information can here found in this issue: https://github.com/ohm-en/obsidian-plugin-manager/issues/2
releases.name: v0.1.3 | Bug Fixes

releases.author: ohm-en
releases.description:
Changes:
1. Bug fixes

Dev Environment:
1. Fix formatting
2. Increase clarity
3. Refactor to use a global store (akin to CLJS)
releases.name: v0.1.2

releases.author: ohm-en
releases.description:
A pre-release version for community testing.

Please note, the plugin doesn’t yet override the normal plugin menu, so using both does cause several issues. If you want lazy loading, make sure not to toggle plugins from the usual ‘Community Plugins’ tab. Fixing this is my primary concern before release.

Also, for now, the startup delay (lazy loading) is set in milliseconds, not seconds.
releases.name: Pre-release
